name: Cohen & Steers Inc
summary:
Cohen & Steers (CNS) reported earnings of $0.85 per share on revenue of $152.73 million for the second quarter ended June 2026. The consensus revenue estimate was revenue of $613.30 million. Revenue grew 12.20% on a year-over-year basis.

Cohen & Steers Inc is an investment manager engaged in real assets, including real estate, infrastructure and commodities, along with preferred securities and other income solutions.
subject: Cohen & Steers Reported Earnings

name: F.N.B. Corporation
summary:
F.N.B. (FNB) reported earnings of $0.42 per share on revenue of $674.96 million for the second quarter ended June 2026. The consensus earnings estimate was $0.86 per share on revenue of $467.96 million. The company missed consensus estimates by 51.16% while revenue grew 0.19% on a year-over-year basis.

F N B Corp is a diversified financial services holding company. It offers Community banking, wealth management, insurance and consumer finance. It has approximately 289 Community Banking offices and approximately 73 Consumer Finance offices.
subject: F.N.B. Missed Consensus Estimates

name: Alcoa, Inc.
summary:
Alcoa (AA) reported earnings of $2.12 per share on revenue of $3.97 billion for the second quarter ended June 2026. The consensus earnings estimate was $2.33 per share on revenue of $3.93 billion. The company missed consensus estimates by 9.01% while revenue grew 31.41% on a year-over-year basis.

Alcoa Inc manufactures and engineers lightweight metals. It products include aluminum, titanium, and nickel, which are used in aircraft, automobiles, commercial transportation, packaging, oil and gas, defense and industrial applications, among others.
subject: Alcoa Missed Consensus Estimates

name: Independent Bank Corp.
summary:
Independent Bank (INDB) reported earnings of $1.70 per share on revenue of $331.68 million for the second quarter ended June 2026. The consensus earnings estimate was $1.77 per share on revenue of $257.73 million. The company missed consensus estimates by 3.95% while revenue grew 31.36% on a year-over-year basis.

Independent Bank Corp is a bank holding company. The Company, through its subsidiary bank, offers banking services, including lending activities, acceptance of demand, savings, and time deposits, and investment management.
subject: Independent Bank Missed Consensus Estimates

name: Netflix, Inc.
summary:
Netflix (NFLX) reported earnings of $0.80 per share on revenue of $12.56 billion for the second quarter ended June 2026. The consensus earnings estimate was $0.79 per share on revenue of $12.57 billion. The Earnings Whisper number was $0.84 per share. The company missed expectations by 4.76% while revenue grew 13.37% on a year-over-year basis.

The company said it expects third quarter earnings of approximately $0.82 per share on revenue of approximately $12.86 billion. The current consensus earnings estimate is $0.83 per share on revenue of $13.02 billion for the quarter ending September 30, 2026.

Netflix is the world's leading streaming entertainment service with 222 million paid memberships in over 190 countries enjoying TV series, documentaries and feature films across a wide variety of genres and languages.
subject: Netflix Missed Expectations

name: Intuitive Surgical, Inc.
summary:
Intuitive Surgical (ISRG) reported earnings of $2.80 per share on revenue of $2.89 billion for the second quarter ended June 2026. The consensus earnings estimate was $2.50 per share on revenue of $2.81 billion. The Earnings Whisper number was $2.64 per share. The company beat expectations by 6.06% while revenue grew 18.54% on a year-over-year basis.

“We are pleased with company performance this quarter, which reflects the strength of our portfolio – from da Vinci and Ion to our growing digital solutions,” said Dave Rosa, Intuitive CEO. “Our commitment to customers around the world – our north star – remains the same: helping them deliver better patient outcomes, better patient and care team experiences, lower costs, and broader access to minimally invasive care.”

Intuitive Surgical Inc designs, manufactures and markets da Vinci Surgical Systems and related instruments and accessories.
subject: Intuitive Surgical Beat Expectations

name: Wipro Limited
summary:
Wipro Limited (WIT) reported earnings of $0.03 per share on revenue of $2.59 billion for the fiscal first quarter ended June 2026. The consensus earnings estimate was $0.03 per share on revenue of $2.62 billion. The Earnings Whisper number was $0.03 per share. The company reported in-line with expectations while revenue grew 0.15% on a year-over-year basis.

The company said it expects second quarter revenue of $2.574 billion to $2.627 billion. The current consensus revenue estimate is $2.62 billion for the quarter ending September 30, 2026.

Wipro Limited is a leading technology services and consulting company focused on building innovative solutions that address clients’ most complex digital transformation needs.
subject: Wipro Limited Reported In-line with Expectations

name: Bank7 Corp.
summary:
Bank7 (BSVN) reported earnings of $0.87 per share on revenue of $31.93 million for the second quarter ended June 2026. The consensus earnings estimate was $1.03 per share on revenue of $24.20 million. The company missed consensus estimates by 15.53% while revenue fell 7.40% compared to the same quarter a year ago.

Bank7 Corp. is a bank holding company headquartered in Oklahoma City, Oklahoma.
subject: Bank7 Missed Consensus Estimates

name: Prologis, Inc.
summary:
Prologis (PLD) reported earnings of $1.63 per share on revenue of $2.43 billion for the second quarter ended June 2026. The consensus earnings estimate was $1.53 per share on revenue of $2.14 billion. The Earnings Whisper number was $1.56 per share. The company beat expectations by 4.49% while revenue grew 11.06% on a year-over-year basis.

The company said it now expects 2026 funds from operations of $6.22 to $6.30 per share. The company's previous guidance was FFO of $6.12 to $6.28 per share, and the current consensus FFO estimate is $6.17 per share for the year ending December 31, 2026.

Prologis Inc is the owner, operator and developer of industrial real estate, focused on hub and gateway distribution markets in the Americas, Europe and Asia.
subject: Prologis Beat Expectations

name: Abbott
summary:
Abbott (ABT) reported earnings of $1.31 per share on revenue of $12.59 billion for the second quarter ended June 2026. The consensus earnings estimate was $1.28 per share on revenue of $12.48 billion. The Earnings Whisper number was $1.28 per share. The company beat expectations by 2.34% while revenue grew 13.02% on a year-over-year basis.

The company said it expects third-quarter earnings of $1.38 to $1.46 per share and now expects 2026 earnings of $5.45 to $5.60 per share while continuing to expect revenue of $47.21 billion to $47.65 billion. The company's previous guidance was 2026 earnings of $5.38 to $5.58 per share. The current consensus estimate is earnings of $1.42 per share for the quarter ending September 30, 2026 and earnings of $5.48 per share on revenue of $50.42 billion for the year ending December 31, 2026.

Abbott Laboratories discovers, develops, manufactures and sells health care products. Its products include branded generic pharmaceuticals manufactured internationally, marketed and sold outside the United States.
subject: Abbott Beat Expectations

name: ManpowerGroup
summary:
ManpowerGroup (MAN) reported earnings of $0.99 per share on revenue of $4.86 billion for the second quarter ended June 2026. The consensus earnings estimate was $0.96 per share on revenue of $4.68 billion. The Earnings Whisper number was $0.99 per share. The company reported in-line with expectations while revenue grew 7.54% on a year-over-year basis.

The company said it expects third quarter earnings of $0.96 to $1.06 per share. The current consensus earnings estimate is $1.03 per share for the quarter ending September 30, 2026.

ManpowerGroup is engaged in the employment services industry. It offers permanent, temporary, and contract recruitment services; assessment and selection services; training and development services; outsourcing services, among others.
subject: ManpowerGroup Reported In-line with Expectations

name: GE Aerospace
summary:
GE Aerospace (GE) reported earnings of $2.02 per share on revenue of $13.35 billion for the second quarter ended June 2026. The consensus earnings estimate was $1.86 per share on revenue of $11.86 billion. The Earnings Whisper number was $1.99 per share. The company beat expectations by 1.51% while revenue grew 21.10% on a year-over-year basis.

The company said it expects 2026 earnings of $7.65 to $7.85 per share on revenue of approximately $49.7 billion. The company's rpevious guidance was earnings of $7.10 to $7.40 per share on revenue of approximately $47.6 billion, and the current consensus earnings estimate is $7.49 per share on revenue of $48.8 billion for the year ending December 31, 2026.

GE Aerospace is a global aerospace propulsion, services, and systems leader with an installed base of approximately 45,000 commercial and 25,000 military aircraft engines.
subject: GE Aerospace Beat Expectations

name: U.S. Bancorp
summary:
U.S. Bancorp (USB) reported earnings of $1.35 per share on revenue of $10.92 billion for the second quarter ended June 2026. The consensus earnings estimate was $1.28 per share on revenue of $7.62 billion. The Earnings Whisper number was $1.31 per share. The company beat expectations by 3.05% while revenue grew 3.75% on a year-over-year basis.

The company said in its earnings presentation it expects third quarter revenue of $7.876 billion to $8.023 billion and now expects 2026 revenue of $30.14 billion to $30.71 billion, excluding BTIG. The company's previous guidance was 2026 revenue of $29.85 billion to $30.42 billion. The current consensus revenue estimate is $7.85 billion for the quarter ending September 30, 2026 and revenue of $30.65 billion for the year ending December 31, 2026.

U.S. Bancorp, with nearly 70,000 employees and $554 billion in assets as of December 31, 2020, is the parent company of U.S. Bank National Association, the fifth-largest commercial bank in the United States.
subject: U.S. Bancorp Beat Expectations

name: Insteel Industries Inc.
summary:
Insteel Industries (IIIN) reported earnings of $0.46 per share on revenue of $197.66 million for the fiscal third quarter ended June 2026. The consensus earnings estimate was $0.45 per share on revenue of $188.63 million. The Earnings Whisper number was $0.38 per share. The company beat expectations by 21.05% while revenue grew 9.88% on a year-over-year basis.

Insteel is the nation’s largest manufacturer of steel wire reinforcing products for concrete construction applications.
subject: Insteel Industries Beat Expectations

name: Citizens Financial Group Inc
summary:
Citizens Financial Group (CFG) reported earnings of $1.30 per share on revenue of $3.20 billion for the second quarter ended June 2026. The consensus earnings estimate was $1.25 per share on revenue of $2.24 billion. The Earnings Whisper number was $1.28 per share. The company beat expectations by 1.56% while revenue grew 6.25% on a year-over-year basis.

The company said in its earnings presentation it expects third quarter revenue of $2.33 billion to $2.35 billion. The current consensus revenue estimate is $2.31 billion for the quarter ending September 30, 2026.

Citizens Financial Group Inc is a bank holding company. The Company, through its subsidiaries, provides retail and commercial banking products and services.
subject: Citizens Financial Group Beat Expectations

name: UnitedHealth Group, Inc.
summary:
UnitedHealth Group (UNH) reported earnings of $6.38 per share on revenue of $112.03 billion for the second quarter ended June 2026. The consensus earnings estimate was $4.94 per share on revenue of $110.05 billion. The Earnings Whisper number was $5.00 per share. The company beat expectations by 27.60% while revenue grew 0.37% on a year-over-year basis.

The company said it expects 2026 earnings of $19.50 to $20.00 per share. The company's previous guidance was earnings to be greater than $18.25 per share, and the current consensus earnings estimate is $18.39 per share for the year ending December 31, 2026.

“Our results and outlook reflect the continuing progress in our work to simplify how we operate, improve both affordability and the health care experience for patients and care providers and apply modern technology to create real improvement for people,” said Stephen Hemsley, chief executive officer of UnitedHealth Group.

UnitedHealth Group is a health care and well-being company with a mission to help people live healthier lives and help make the health system work better for everyone through two distinct and complementary businesses.
subject: UnitedHealth Group Beat Expectations

name: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company Limited
summary:
Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company Limited (TSM) reported earnings of $4.31 per share on revenue of $40.20 billion for the second quarter ended June 2026. The consensus earnings estimate was $3.87 per share on revenue of $39.63 billion. The Earnings Whisper number was $3.98 per share. The company beat expectations by 8.29% while revenue grew 33.69% on a year-over-year basis.

The company said it expects third quarter revenue of $44.6 billion to $45.8 billion. The current consensus revenue estimate is $42.6 billion for the quarter ending September 30, 2026.

Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co Ltd engages in the manufacturing, selling, packaging, testing and computer-aided design of integrated circuits and other semiconductor devices, it also manufactures masks.
subject: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company Limited Beat Expectations
